channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In lawsuit, Minnesota accuses Trump administration of 'weaponizing' Medicaid funding
item.description: The federal government said the state should do more to fight fraud and is holding back funds. Minnesota officials say the attack is unfair as the sta...

item.title: A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
When ICE came, Minneapolis created underground health networks. Should other cities?
item.description: The Trump administration's immigration crackdown in Minneapolis forced some families into hiding and catalyzed informal medical networks to deliver cr...

item.title: Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
This Sleep Factor Matters More Than Actual Sleep Quality, Study Says
item.description: And it can impact your mood the next day.

item.title: These Zodiac Signs Are Clueless In LoveâAre You One Of Them?
This New Testing Program Screens For 50+ Types Of Cancerâ¡
5 Things An OB/GYN Wants You To Do Daily For A Way Healthier Vagina
item.description: We don't talk about vaginal health enough.

item.title: Lacking This Vitamin May Increase Your Fracture Risk By Up To 48%
item.description: Make sure you're getting enough of it.

item.title: Telehealth abortion is in the courts. Share your experience.
item.description: Mifepristone is facing another major legal challenge.

item.title: Why supporting a shelter for women is now 'kind of radioactive'
item.description: That's how researcher Beatriz Garcia Nice describes the new U.S. stance under the Trump administration to programs addressing gender-based violence.

item.title: A new one-a-day-pill holds promise for HIV's 'forgotten population'
item.description: It's designed to take the place of complicated, multiple drug regimens that many people with HIV need to follow. And it's also beneficial because the ...
